title: Dinkstr's Better Minecraft Progression
description: A modpack I put together that uses a plethora of optimization mods (client and serverside) as well as biome, structure, cooking, building, weapon and leveling mods to provide a new experience along whilst staying vanilla friendly. Is a great beginner pack!
body: Want a simple and seemless Minecraft Plus experience? Want it to run better aswell? Look no further! A modpack that includes the majority of changes of Simply Optimized for client and serverside performance increases. The rest are vanilla friendly mods to make the game feel new and fresh, with better world generation, biomes, mobs and structures for all three dimensions, with improved combat options and buildcrafting. The experience between all the mods should feel seemless as all of them were handpicked to mesh together for an unjarring experience, no stray mods that dont serve the purpose of a simple experience.
